creator: jfvogel@gmail.com
text:
I have an X60 and repro is being arranged, I have also found out that
the problem is known, its the power management stuff, the PCI-E link
to the adapter goes to sleep in some circumstances and causes this
checksum failure, there is a proposed workaround that I am going to
test.

Jack
